articles.description: Day 15 of the Milan-Cortina Winter Olympics, with Team GB in early bobsleigh and cross country skiing action.
articles.title: Winter Olympics 2026 LIVE: Day 15 - watch BBC - medals, results, TV stream & updates from Milan-Cortina

articles.description: Curling might seem a strange choice for prime-time Saturday night viewing, but at 18:05 GMT - live on the BBC - millions will find themselves staring at televisions, tablets, laptops and phones to see if Team GB can add a fourth gold medal of these Winter Olympics.
articles.title: Winter Olympics 2026: Curling, controversial Canadians, bagpipes & James Bond - why it will be must-watch

articles.description: England skipper Harry Brook says it would be "a shame" if Pakistan players were excluded from playing in The Hundred, and confirms he will not captain Sunrisers Leeds this year.
articles.title: The Hundred: Harry Brook says Pakistan players' exclusion would be "a shame"

articles.title: Tottenham v Arsenal: North London derby now a test of Gunners' 'bottle'

articles.description: "Wonderfully different" Henry Pollock will start his first England Test in Saturday's must-win Six Nations game against Ireland.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: 'Generational' Henry Pollock ready for first England start against England

articles.description: Former world champion Floyd Mayweather will come out of retirement for a fourth time following his upcoming exhibition bout with Mike Tyson, to take part in his first professional fight for nearly 10 years.
articles.title: Floyd Mayweather ends retirement again to return to professional boxing

articles.description: Sources tell BBC Sport that Crystal Palace's board is considering Oliver Glasner's future at the club.
articles.title: Oliver Glasner: Crystal Palace manager's future in serious doubt

articles.description: "Losing the dressing room" is now part of football's vocabulary. Chief football writer Phil McNulty asks what it means, how it happens and can it be solved?
articles.title: 'Losing the dressing room' - what can it mean? How does it happen?

articles.description: World number two Rory McIlroy is one shot off leaders Marco Penge and Jacob Bridgeman at the halfway stage of the Genesis Invitational.
articles.title: Genesis Invitational: Rory McIlroy hunts leaders Marco Penge & Jacob Bridgeman

articles.description: Pedro Neto has been criticised for lacking a "killer instinct", but the Chelsea winger's shape-shifting role goes some way to explain that.
articles.title: Pedro Neto: Chelsea's misunderstood winger
